title: Section 33
content: No act of 1[any Institute] or Governing Council or Senate or any other authority, set up under this Act or the Statutes, shall be invalid merely by reason of-- (a) any vacancy in, or defect in the constitution thereof; or (b) any defect in the election, nomination or appointment of a person acting as a member thereof; or (c) any irregularity in its procedure not affecting the merits of the case.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 38 of 2019, s. 27, for "the Institute" (w.e.f. 13-1-2020).
